title: ai-inputs-atlas: a reproducible analysis of national AI inputs (compute and talent) and AI knowledge output
description: Toolkit and machine-learning analysis measuring two legs of the AI Triad (compute and talent) across countries and testing which input binds national AI knowledge output, with a focus on a catch-up economy (Kazakhstan) against advanced benchmarks. Includes the assembled country panel, an econometric OLS core, a gradient-boosting triangulation with permutation and SHAP importance, and all figures. Accompanies the economics manuscript of the same study.
